site_desc: Enter your family information to generate a personalized disaster preparedness handbook PDF
privacy_notice: All data is processed only in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to any server. Data is cleared when you close the page.
members_desc: Fill in to customize supply lists and medical info. You can also skip and handwrite on the printed PDF.
name: Name
different_address: This member lives at a different address
contacts_desc: We recommend at least one out-of-city contact. You can also skip and handwrite.
handbook_ready_desc: You can edit shelter info before downloading to ensure accuracy
click_to_edit: Click name or address to edit
no_shelters: No shelter data found. Please contact your local village office.
update_yearly: Update your handbook once a year
update_yearly_desc: Especially after changing phone numbers, medications, or moving.
line_share_text: I just made my disaster handbook! My nearest shelter is "{shelter}" ({distance}). You can make one too:
error_desc: We're sorry, the page encountered an error. Please refresh or return to the homepage.
